protocols.name: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
protocols.description: 让AI Agent连接外部工具和数据源的开放协议，2026年最大版本更新

protocols.name: A2A (Agent-to-Agent)
protocols.description: 让不同框架的AI Agent互相通信和协作

protocols.name: ACP (Agent Communication Protocol)
protocols.description: IBM主导的Agent通信协议

protocols.name: OpenClaw Skill Protocol
protocols.description: Agent技能描述和分发协议

protocols.name: LSP (Language Server Protocol)
protocols.description: 编辑器与语言服务通信协议

protocols.name: AG-UI (Agent User Interaction Protocol)
protocols.description: Agent与前端UI交互的开放协议，定义Agent事件流到UI组件的映射

protocols.name: ANP (Agent Network Protocol)
protocols.description: 去中心化Agent网络协议，支持Agent发现和互操作

protocols.name: OpenAPI/Swagger
protocols.description: REST API描述标准，MCP Server可从OpenAPI自动生成

protocols.name: gRPC
protocols.description: 高性能RPC框架，Agent间低延迟通信

protocols.name: GraphQL
protocols.description: 灵活的API查询语言，Agent按需获取数据

protocols.name: WASM Component Model
protocols.description: WebAssembly组件模型，Agent安全沙箱执行

protocols.name: JSON-RPC 2.0
protocols.description: 轻量级远程过程调用协议，MCP底层传输之一

protocols.name: Server-Sent Events (SSE)
protocols.description: 服务器推送事件流，MCP远程传输方式

protocols.name: DAP (Debug Adapter Protocol)
protocols.description: 调试适配器协议，Agent调试和可观测性

protocols.name: OpenTelemetry
protocols.description: 可观测性标准，Agent tracing/metrics/logs

protocols.name: FHIR (Healthcare API)

key_features: Type-safe agent framework built on Pydantic

key_features: Stateful workflow engine for AI agents
Scales to millions of concurrent workflows
